page.title: Workspace Operations Analytics
page.description: Track token consumption, model mix, and control-plane readiness from one operational surface.
page.summary: Current workspace posture: {{activeInstances}}/{{totalInstances}} instances online, {{activeAutomations}} automations active, {{connectedChannels}} delivery channels connected, health score {{healthScore}}%.

filters.sevenDaysHint: Best for spotting recent usage shifts
filters.monthHint: Review one full month of model and spend structure
filters.customHint: Inspect an exact start and end window
filters.rangeDialogDescription: Keep the chart header compact and configure monthly or custom windows in a focused popup.
filters.invalidCustomRange: End date must be on or after the start date

sections.tokenIntelligenceDescription: Analyze total tokens, input-output mix, cache behavior, and cost movement across the selected window.
sections.modelDistributionDescription: Compare request, token, and spend distribution by model so cost mix is visible before it becomes waste.
sections.revenueTrendDescription: Track recent revenue movement across the active analytics window so growth pace and business momentum stay visible.
sections.revenueDistributionDescription: Break revenue down by product mix to see which offers contribute the most to current business performance.
sections.activityWorkbenchDescription: Move from summary to evidence with recent API calls, revenue records, product performance, and focused alerts.
sections.usageByInstanceDescription: See which instances are carrying the heaviest model traffic and spend share.
sections.instancesDescription: Review runtime readiness, resource pressure, and token share on every instance that carries operator traffic.
sections.capabilitiesDescription: See which agents are ready for orchestration work, what they focus on, and how well they fit automation.
sections.automationsDescription: Monitor active schedules, delivery modes, and upcoming execution windows from one list.
sections.channelsDescription: Confirm approvals, alerts, and summaries can leave the workspace through healthy delivery endpoints.
sections.recommendationsDescription: Target the next few improvements that most increase reliability, readiness, and operator throughput.
sections.watchlistDescription: Keep the biggest concentration, delivery, and automation risks visible without repeating the top-line story.

healthScore.label: Workspace health
healthScore.description: A blended indicator for workspace resilience, availability, and operator readiness.

capabilityCoverage.label: Capability coverage
capabilityCoverage.description: Shows how broadly your agents, skills, and delivery paths can support automation.

instanceAvailability.label: Instance availability
instanceAvailability.description: Online instances currently ready to absorb new operator workload.

automationCadence.label: Active automations
automationCadence.description: Recurring routines currently contributing to the operating rhythm.

revenue.label: Window revenue
revenue.description: Total revenue captured across the selected analytics window.

dailyRevenue.label: Daily revenue
dailyRevenue.description: Revenue normalized to a per-day pace so the window is easy to compare.

businessConversion.label: Business conversion
businessConversion.description: Track how call activity turns into orders, value, and monetized business output.

tokenUsage.label: Token usage
tokenUsage.description: A compact view of token volume across the selected analytics window.

estimatedSpend.label: Actual spend
estimatedSpend.description: Effective spend calculated from the current token and model mix.

empty.loadingDescription: The analytics snapshot could not be loaded. Retry to recover the latest workspace view.
empty.noChannels: No delivery channels are configured yet.
empty.noRecommendations: The workspace has no urgent recommendations right now.

stabilizeInstances.title: Stabilize degraded runtime capacity
stabilizeInstances.description: One or more instances are degraded. Recover capacity before expanding new operator load.

connectDelivery.title: Connect at least one delivery channel
connectDelivery.description: Operator alerts and approval flows are not reaching an external channel. Restore outbound delivery readiness.

expandCapabilities.title: Expand reusable capability coverage
expandCapabilities.description: Install a broader skill baseline so each instance can support richer agent workflows and automation paths.

repairAutomations.title: Repair failed automation routines
repairAutomations.description: Failed jobs are pulling down reliability. Recover the broken task chain before scaling throughput.

scaleOperators.title: Workspace is ready to scale operator workflows
scaleOperators.description: The current health and capability baseline is strong enough to expand autonomous task orchestration.

watchlist.tokenConcentrationDescription: {{instance}} carries the largest share of token traffic. Balance workload before capacity becomes uneven.
watchlist.automationBacklogDescription: Paused or failed jobs reduce operating rhythm immediately. Recover the most important recurring routines first.
watchlist.deliveryCoverageDescription: Approvals, alerts, and summaries depend on healthy outbound channels. Close the notification gap early.
watchlist.expansionReadinessTitle: Expansion readiness is not yet stable
watchlist.expansionReadinessDescription: Use capability coverage together with workspace health to judge when the next layer of automation is safe.

footer.healthDescription: Health blends runtime availability, automation reliability, and delivery readiness into one operating signal.
footer.operatorsDescription: Capability cards keep agent focus, automation fit, and execution range visible for the team.
footer.deliveryDescription: Channel readiness stays visible so approvals, alerts, and summaries can leave the workspace when needed.

page.title: Gateway Usage
page.description: Review gateway session usage, costs, compatibility fallback state, and per-session detail from one shared workspace.
page.emptyDescription: Add or start a gateway-backed instance before reviewing usage and cost evidence.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Filter by session, model, agent, or channel
filters.invalidRange: End date must be on or after the start date.

sections.sessionsDescription: Inspect session-level volume, cost concentration, and error distribution before drilling into one conversation.
sections.dailyBreakdownDescription: Compare daily usage and cost totals against message and error activity.
sections.sessionDetailDescription: Keep the active session context, model choice, provider, and timing evidence visible.
sections.sessionTimelineDescription: Review token and cost movement across the selected session timeline.
sections.sessionLogsDescription: Inspect the raw session usage log stream returned by the selected gateway.

labels.noSessions: No sessions matched the current filters.
labels.noDailyBreakdown: No daily usage data is available for the selected range.
labels.noSessionSelected: Select a session to inspect detail, timeline, and logs.
labels.refineSessionSelection: Select a single session to inspect detail, timeline, and logs.
labels.noTimeline: No timeline points are available for the selected session.
labels.noLogs: No session logs are available for the selected session.
labels.noLogTools: No tool invocations were detected in the current log stream.
labels.noMatchingLogs: No log entries matched the current log filters.
